scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/shared && concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/backend && npm run build -w apps/frontend
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/backend/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/frontend/tsconfig.json
